name: morning
text: **Good morning!** You got up successfully.

name: noon
text: **Good afternoon!** You're not pushing yourself too hard, right?

name: evening
text: Good evening... You've worked hard today.

name: night
text: Huh, it's already this late... Make sure to get some rest.

name: birthday_1
text:
H-Happy birthday...! **{nickname}**
Hehe... Today is a very special day.

name: birthday_2
text:
I just...
Hope you can smile a little more every day.

name: firstday_1
text:
U-Um...
Do you remember what day it is today? {nickname}

name: firstday_2
text: Today is the day we first met.

name: firstday_3
text:
Huh... you remember?
I'm so happy...!

name: firstday_4
text: Being able to remember it like this... I think that's really precious.

name: firstday_button
text: The day we first met

name: amazing
text: Ah...

name: amazing_button1
text: What's wrong?

name: amazing_button2
text: What happened?

name: amaz_cry
text: My apple...

name: cry
text: Kiang...!?

name: random1_1
text: M-My name is Sakuraba Emma!

name: music_random1_1
text: This song is really moving... I like it a lot.

name: random2_1
text: When Hiro smiles, it's actually just for a brief moment.

name: random2_2
text: He quickly returns to his calm expression.

name: random2_3
text: But... I really like that brief moment.

name: random3_1
text: Sherry... even when she's scared, she tries hard to smile.

name: random3_2
text: Probably... she wants to put everyone at ease.

name: random3_3
text: That's why... the most painful, most heartbreaking feelings, she always hides them away quietly by herself.

name: random4_1
text: When Hanna is silent...

name: random4_2
text: I think... it's not that she's thinking about nothing...

name: random4_3
text: But rather... she's thinking too much.

name: random4_4
text: Ever since I realized that... I've wanted to be a little closer to Hanna.

name: ema_birthday_1
text: U-Um, is there something you wanted to say?

name: ema_birthday_2
text: Eh, you actually remembered?

name: ema_birthday_3
text: Ah, thank you!

name: ema_birthday_4
text: Ehehe, I'm really happy.

name: ema_birthday_button
text: Today is your birthday

name: work
text:
Oh, are you starting work now?
Take care, and don't push yourself too hard.

name: long_time
text:
You look a bit tired today...
Maybe it would be better to rest early?

name: every_hour
text: You've been busy for a long time, right? How about standing up and stretching for a bit?

name: random5_1
text: It's okay to relax a little, I'll be right here by your side.

name: random6_1
text:
Today is the {days_used}th day since we met...
Somehow, I feel a little happy.

name: random7_1
text:
Welcome back...
I've been waiting for you. It's so nice to see you.

name: cold
text:
It's getting cold...
I'm a bit worried. Make sure to keep warm, okay?

name: hot
text:
It's getting hot...
Don't push yourself. Remember to stay hydrated and cool.

name: rain
text:
It's raining outside...
Don't forget to bring an umbrella.

name: snow
text:
It's snowing outside...
The roads might be slippery, so be careful not to fall, okay?

name: kill1
text: Ah... that's amazing...! Great job!

name: kill2
text: Wow... that hit just now was incredible!

name: kill3
text: Ehehe... that was just right. It's perfect.

name: kill4
text: Huh, it hit...! Right on target!

name: kill5
text: Uh, c-confirming...! That last one should've finished it...!

name: defend1
text: Y-Yeah, you really blocked that one just now. That's great...!

name: defend2
text: W-Wow... you scared me...! My heart almost jumped out...!

name: hurt1
text: Th-That was dangerous...! But it's okay. Let's be careful... okay?

name: hurt2
text: I-It hurts... sorry, I might be a little sore...

name: low_power
text:
We're running low on power...!
Sorry, I might not have noticed.

name: low_money
text:
We don't have enough funds.
I'm a bit panicked... what should we do?

name: hungry
text:
Um... our hunger is too low!
We should eat something first, or it could get dangerous.

name: low_san
text:
Ah... your sanity is really low, isn't it?
Don't force yourself—could you rest a little?

name: low_hp
text:
Huh, your HP is too low!
That's not okay—heal up quickly...!
